query:
SELECT
                s.id,
                s.id_corto,
                s.slug AS "slug!",
                s.creador_id AS "creator_id!"
             FROM samples s
             WHERE s.eliminado_en IS NULL
               AND (LOWER(s.slug) = LOWER($1) OR s.id_corto = $1)
             ORDER BY CASE WHEN LOWER(s.slug) = LOWER($1) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, s.id DESC
             LIMIT 1
